faqs.question: How much does bed bug treatment cost in Laurelton?
faqs.answer: Bed bug treatment in Laurelton typically ranges from $1,200 to $3,500, depending on the size of your home, severity of the infestation, and treatment method used. We offer free inspections to provide you with an accurate quote tailored to your specific situation.

faqs.question: How long does bed bug treatment take in a Laurelton home?
faqs.answer: Most bed bug treatments in Laurelton homes take 4-8 hours for heat treatment or 2-3 hours for chemical treatment. Multi-unit buildings may require additional time. We typically recommend a follow-up inspection 2-3 weeks after the initial treatment to ensure complete elimination.

faqs.question: Are bed bug treatments safe for families and pets in Laurelton?
faqs.answer: Yes, all our bed bug treatments are safe for families and pets when applied by our certified professionals. We use EPA-approved products and follow strict safety protocols. For heat treatments, you'll need to remove pets and heat-sensitive items, but you can typically return home the same day.

faqs.question: Do you offer same-day bed bug service in Laurelton, Queens?
faqs.answer: Yes, we offer same-day and emergency bed bug services throughout Laurelton and surrounding Queens neighborhoods. We understand how stressful bed bug infestations can be, so we prioritize rapid response times. Call us before noon for potential same-day treatment availability.
